title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: 1. **High – Completion/Recovery state is internally inconsistent.** `run-complete` records backup + compact artifact but does not close runtime ledger state, while runtime loop only marks `terminal` when a stop file exists. In actual ledger data, completed runs remain `state: running`, which weakens operator trust and automated recovery routing. Evidence: [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh#L137), [kernel-runtime-loop.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/kernel-runtime-loop.sh#L84), [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L622), [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L626). 2. **High – `/vote` provenance is not hard-gated on the workflow-dispatch path.** Main production path allows `workflow_dispatch` with `vote_command=false` by default, and `should_run` is decided by labels/trust, not vote provenance; this weakens “vote-first” evidence quality. Evidence: [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L57), [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L61), [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L153), [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L899). Recent pattern check (2026-04-07 JST): latest 20 `fugue-tutti-caller` runs were `workflow_dispatch`. 3. **High – Local runtime receipts show repeated degraded lane behavior in recent runs.** Recent ledger entries show repeated `glm-command-exit-1` and optional-lane failures with trusted attestations, indicating persistent fragility in non-Codex lanes and recovery quality below “90+” reliability expectations. Evidence: [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L1478), [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L1496), [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L1521), [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L1582). 4. **Medium – CI gate does not execute several key orchestration policy tests.** Important policy/regression tests exist but are not included in the main orchestration gate workflow, leaving drift risk in defaults/recovery semantics. Evidence (gate executed list): [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L327), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L352). Evidence (tests present but not wired in workflows): [test-orchestrator-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-orchestrator-policy.sh#L1), [test-execution-profile-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-execution-profile-policy.sh#L1), [test-github-orchestrator-defaults.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-github-orchestrator-defaults.sh#L1), [test-kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh#L1), [test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh#L1). 5. **Medium – Vote integration quality relies on mutable lane JSON/http code rather than strong provenance checks.** Aggregator logic decides critical gates from `agent-results/*.json` and `http_code` heuristics; it does not perform attestation verification at aggregation time, reducing evidence robustness.
